subcodes.first_line: O namesake of 'Abdu'l-Bahá, in the Qur'án, the Manifest Book of God, He saith: "The Day when man shall flee from his mother and his father..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سمی عبدالبهاء در فرقان کتاب مبین الهی میفرماید یوم یفر المرء من امه و ابیه
subcodes.subjects: @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @service to others; to the Cause of God, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love
